title: callitris robusta var. intratropica
intro: Callitris robusta var. intratropica, also known as the 'Inland Cypress Pine', is a variety of Callitris robusta, a plant species native to Australia. It has been traditionally used in Australian Aboriginal medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to provide health benefits such as relieving respiratory issues, reducing fever, and aiding in wound healing. Herbal preparations of Callitris robusta var. intratropica include teas, tinctures, and poultices, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
